summary: Iteration 50 - Verified ReportView redesign matching landing page style. All colour-coded design elements confirmed working: dark blue gradient header for full_detailed report type, case overview grid (Defendant/Offence/Sentence/Documents/Timeline), Table of Contents bar with 9 clickable section links, numbered sections with blue left borders and UPPERCASE headings, professional markdown tables with blue gradient headers, export buttons (PDF/Word/Print/Barrister View) all visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console hydration warnings about span elements in thead/tbody - these are from Emergent's visual editor wrapper spans, not the app code. Does not affect functionality or appearance.
seed_data_creation: Used seeded data: case-render-test with report rpt-render-test (full_detailed type)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ReportView.jsx redesign verified. REPORT_THEME object at line ~94 provides colour configs for all 3 report types: quick_summary (green), full_detailed (blue), extensive_log (purple). ReportsSection.jsx inline reports now have colour-coded headers at line ~251. BarristerView.jsx uses .legal-report CSS class. App title shows 'Appeal Case Manager' (not preview URL subdomain).
